summary: WhatsApp Templates feature testing complete - Backend APIs 100% pass, Frontend UI working after bug fix

minor.issue: BUG FIXED: Was returning 500 when creating new template - `WhatsAppTemplate` object has no attribute 'get'
minor.resolution: Fixed by refetching template from DB after insert to ensure consistent dict handling

ui_bugs.issue: BUG FIXED: 401 Unauthorized errors when loading/saving templates - `token` was not exposed from AuthContext

issues: React controlled/uncontrolled component warning for Switch - cosmetic warning in console
ESLint warning: useEffect missing fetchTemplates dependency - cosmetic warning

action_items: AiSensy account needs active plan for actual WhatsApp notifications to work - currently returns 'No Plan active on assistant'
Consider fixing the controlled/uncontrolled Switch warning in WhatsAppTemplates.js (line 191)
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsAppTemplates.js Line 59: useEffect dependency array warning - add fetchTemplates to deps or use useCallback
seed_data_creation: Created test templates for all 5 events (order_placed, order_confirmed, order_ready, out_for_delivery, delivered) with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Templates feature fully tested. Backend has 16 passing tests covering all CRUD operations, auth, and order event triggers. Frontend UI tested with Playwright - navigation, template loading, form filling, toggle, and save all working. AiSensy integration works but test account lacks active plan. Two bugs were fixed during testing: 1) Backend template creation 500 error, 2) Frontend 401 auth errors.

backend_bug.root_cause: When creating a new template, code tried to call .get() method on WhatsAppTemplate Pydantic model instead of dict
backend_bug.fix: After inserting new template, refetch from DB to ensure consistent dict type handling

frontend_bug.symptom: WhatsApp Templates page showed 401 Unauthorized errors, failed to load/save templates
frontend_bug.root_cause: AuthContext.js did not export 'token' in the context value, but WhatsAppTemplates.js tried to use it
frontend_bug.fix: Added 'token' to the value object in AuthContext.js

features_verified: WhatsApp Templates page loads correctly for Super Admin
All 5 event cards displayed (Order Placed, Order Confirmed, Order Ready, Out for Delivery, Delivered)
Each template card has Campaign Name input, Template Message textarea, Enable/Disable toggle, Save button
Save button saves template configuration - WORKING
WhatsApp notification triggered on order creation (ORDER_PLACED event) - WORKING (AiSensy returns 400 due to no active plan)
WhatsApp notification triggered on order status update - WORKING
Navigation to WhatsApp Templates page via sidebar - WORKING
